meaning: Stored-format expansion exceeded maxExpandedCommands.
No explicit height or ^LL was available, so the configured fallback was used.
No explicit width or ^PW was available, so the configured fallback was used.
A requested font could not be resolved and deterministic Font 0 was used.
Decoded or transmitted graphic bytes differ from the declared count.
A wrapped graphic payload failed its declared CRC.
A graphic or downloaded object exceeded maxGraphicBytes.
Format commands appeared outside an explicit ^XA/^XZ pair.
A structured symbol requested more segments than ^FM supplied origins for.
Barcode field data or parameters cannot be encoded.
A command token is malformed.
A known command was used with the wrong ^ or ~ identity.
Field data cannot be decoded with the active encoding.
A per-render ^FN override used an invalid field number or a non-string value.
A B64 graphic wrapper contains invalid Base64.
A binary graphic contains non-byte characters or a truncated payload.
ASCII graphic compression is malformed.
Graphic data cannot be decoded.
Graphic dimensions or row geometry are invalid.
A graphic contains invalid hexadecimal data.
^GS selected an unknown bundled symbol.
A B64 or Z64 wrapper is malformed.
A compressed graphic cannot be inflated.
^FH field data contains an invalid escape.
The parser received an input value other than a string.
A downloaded object or font payload is invalid.
A QR alphanumeric segment contains a character outside its alphabet.
A QR byte segment contains malformed byte data.
A QR byte segment length differs from its declaration.
A QR segment selected an invalid character mode.
QR field data is malformed for the requested mode.
A QR numeric segment contains non-decimal data.
QR structured-append metadata is invalid.
A ^SF mask and increment exceed the documented combined size limit.
Resolved label dimensions or a temporary field raster exceeded maxDimension, maxPixels, or the remaining render-call pixel budget.
^PQ requested more output labels than maxLabels.
A barcode field has no field data.
The selected downloaded encoding is not present in the session.
A referenced graphic is not present in the session.
A syntax-prefix command omitted its replacement character.
A recalled stored format is not present in the session.
A format definition appeared inside another format definition.
A recognized device-only command was intentionally raster-neutral.
A downloaded object's decoded bytes differ from its declaration.
The selected profile marks this command as partial.
The active format and control prefix characters collide, so ambiguous commands are treated as format commands.
Stored-format expansion detected a recall cycle.
^BZ selected a reserved postal barcode type.
A download, format, transfer, or image save exceeded maxSessionBytes.
A structured barcode segment could not be encoded.
Stored-format recall exceeded maxTemplateDepth.
^FB field data exceeded its documented 3 KiB layout limit.
Non-whitespace source text appeared outside a command.
The full command identity is absent from the pinned profile.
^XZ appeared without a matching ^XA.
^CI selected a character set outside the pinned profile.
^BC selected an unsupported mode.
The selected profile recognizes but does not implement the command.
A field-selection mode is outside the renderer profile.
A downloaded object uses an unsupported image format.
The requested renderer profile is unavailable.
^BQ selected an unsupported QR model.
Field data reached the end of its format without ^FS.
A ^XA format reached end of input without ^XZ.
